testCases: TC3: Thin-film, no battery, low bill
TC10: batteryBackup as string "true" → normalized to true
TC11: batteryBackup string "false" → normalized to false
TC14: Floating point inputs with many decimals

TC17: batteryBackup as 1 (truthy) → normalized to true? Our validate should convert truthy/falsy or accept only booleans? The spec says "real booleans" but in validate we could be lenient. We'll treat only boolean true/false strictly; otherwise error. So batteryBackup as 1 should error.
TC19: All valid but using Polycrystalline with uppercase and mixed case for panelType
TC20: Zero monthlyElectricBill → error (must be positive)
TC22: panelType with trailing spaces → should trim and normalize
